name: Multi Block Change
desc: Updates multiple blocks within a single chunk. More efficient than sending many S23 packets.

fields.name: changedBlocks
fields.desc: Array of (block coordinate, new block state) pairs

encoding: Block position in chunk + new block state

implementation.overview: S22 updates multiple blocks in one chunk at once. More efficient than individual S23. Used by explosions, piston chains, large block modifications. No module in the examined client sources directly targets S22.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S22PacketMultiBlockChange)
modules.purpose: Server sends S22PacketMultiBlockChange to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
